findings.description: shell=True with externally-sourced strings in check_git and check_tests_pass enabled shell injection
findings.proposedRule: Subprocess calls MUST use list-form args. shell=True requires documented trust boundary.

findings.description: evals.json used state_check but grader dispatched on state — silent mismatch always returns false
findings.proposedRule: Eval definition types must match grader dispatch keys. Add schema validation.

findings.description: CalledProcessError.__str__() omits stderr — tests asserting str(exc) contains stderr fail
findings.proposedRule: Wrap subprocess.run(check=True) with helper that re-raises with stderr.

findings.description: os.path.exists() with glob wildcards always returns False — file_not_exists always passes
findings.proposedRule: File existence checks must detect and expand glob patterns.

findings.description: Tester introduced CheckResult name (plan said ExpectationResult). Executor followed tester. Plan diverged silently.
findings.proposedRule: Note naming divergences from plan in first status card.
